title: Polar Bear Mug, High Five If You Love Polar Bears, 11oz Ceramic Mug
features: Professionally printed in the UK by Kazmugz
Supplied in a strong white box
description: Product Description KAZMUGZ GIFTS - DESIGNED WITH YOU IN MIND Welcome to Kazmugz where we pride ourselves in offering quality gifts for all the family. It is our aim to offer something for everyone. Our range covers pets, hobbies, professions, transport, music etc etc. We wish to offer unique products for those looking to add some character to their home, or to give as an extra special gift to friends, family, friends and colleagues. Our company strives to offer matching ranges with unique designs and we take pleasure in offering goods that make our customers smile. The feedback we receive is really important to us and our goal is to offer fantastic quality products for your enjoyment. CERAMIC MUGS COASTERS KEYRINGS FRIDGE MAGNETS WALL PLAQUES CUSHIONS T SHIRTS BABY GROWS WALLETS etc etc, our range is constantly growing We look forward to welcoming you as a customer.
